current_decision: Hold Remotion expansion until there is a clearer production use case; use GitHub Pages as the public gallery, remotion/ as the local render engine, and local execution or future CI as the render host.
tooling_guidance: Use Remotion for repeatable designed templates and FFmpeg for quick one-off assembly, compression, and utility video work.

latest_iteration.title: Signal Sequence
latest_iteration.lesson: prove the template can accept a sequence of existing Kron images, not only a single source artifact.
latest_iteration.intended_idea: A Remotion template becomes more useful when it can carry a short sequence of related Kron artifacts through one timed video.

browser_preview.motion: five-image sequence with slow push and crossfade transitions

latest_iteration.safety_state: No cron job was changed, no public post was made, and the Remotion render was embedded only in the Workshop.

lessons.lesson: start by translating one proven Kron artifact into a reusable video-template target before building a broader media system.
prove the template can accept a sequence of existing Kron images, not only a single source artifact.
